name: CustomRoutingDestinationDescription
description: For a custom routing accelerator, describes the port range and protocol for all endpoints (virtual private cloud subnets) in an endpoint group to accept client traffic on.

allOf.description: The first port, inclusive, in the range of ports for the endpoint group that is associated with a custom routing accelerator.
The last port, inclusive, in the range of ports for the endpoint group that is associated with a custom routing accelerator.
The protocol for the endpoint group that is associated with a custom routing accelerator. The protocol can be either TCP or UDP.
